title: Master_Recycling_Guide_Part_8_Faqs_And_Edge_Cases
text:
------------------------------------------------------------------------

# When the Answer Is Unclear

If you cannot determine whether an item is recyclable:

1.  Check your city or county recycling website.
2.  Contact your waste hauler.
3.  Search a trusted recycling directory.
4.  Avoid wish-cycling.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Search Keywords

Users may search using terms like: - recycle - recyclable - compost -
trash - garbage - blue bin - green bin - black bin - curbside
recycling - e-waste - HHW - bulky item

Include common item names and synonyms when searching.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# References

-   U.S. EPA Recycling: https://www.epa.gov/recycle
-   CalRecycle: https://calrecycle.ca.gov/
-   Earth911 Recycling Search: https://search.earth911.com/
